ocr.text: In the comparative analysis of drug interactions, the first row features Drug 2 Digoxin paired with Drug 1 Furosmide, yielding a

a percentage of 0.08 and a count of 65,103. The fourth row involves Drug 2 Haloperidol and Drug 1 Propranolol, producing a
percentage of 0.04 and a count of 26,789.
The fifth row lists Drug 2 Amitriptyline with Drug 1 Clonidine, which has a percentage of 0.03 and a count of 20,666. In the
sixth row, Drug 2 Doxycycline is paired with Drug 1 Penicilline G, showing a percentage of 0.01 and a count of 8,526. The
seventh row indicates Drug 2 Chlorpromazine with Drug 1 Propranolol, also at a percentage of 0.01 and a count of 8,049. The
eighth row features Drug 2 Propranolol paired with Drug 1 Verapamil, resulting in a percentage of 0.009 and a count of 6,904.
The ninth row presents Drug 2 Amiodaron in conjunction with Drug 1 Digoxin, yielding a percentage of 0.008 and a count of
